title: Hytale Font
description: Hytale Font In Minecraft. play minecraft with the original hytale font
body:

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/nL1IgKbU)

I'd love if you'd subscribe to my [Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Vanilama-modded). I currently have:
![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCDxuZBN23kygVFELbTMxpsg?style=flat-square&logo=youtube&logoColor=%23FF0000&labelColor=%232a2d32&color=%232a2d32&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2F%40Vanilama-modded)

   


Hytale Font is a resourcepack introducing the Font from hytale to minecraft
---

The pack was made for 1.21.10 but is **guaranteed** to work in every **1.21.x** version. other versions may also work but havent been tested

## Notice
Hytale Font sometimes has some white dots when the text is gray for example. im assuming that its because of the Fonts resolution. Also i used a ttf font so that could also be the problem.

![Main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7ded9a3d23afcf1d66d1495f32a48151266947d.jpeg)
The Panorama isnt included in the resourcepack but you can get it [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soothing-scenes-backgrounds)
